mood: Objective, stark, architectural, giving maximum breathing room for colorful illustrations. It acts as a blank, highly-structured gallery wall.

layout_and_spacing.general: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-8 to p-24 for section paddings. No cramped content.
layout_and_spacing.portfolio_grid: Asymmetrical 2 or 3 column grid. Some items span 2 rows or 2 columns (Tetris Grid). Gap should be gap-8 to gap-16 to let art breathe.
layout_and_spacing.borders_and_surfaces: Grid Borders: Expose the skeleton. Container uses border-collapse style layout or crisp 1px borders (border-[#E1E3E8]) with zero border-radius (sharp corners). NO soft shadows.

components.button: Solid black (#0A0B10) with white text, sharp corners (rounded-none). Hover: Background shifts to accent (#FF3333) with crisp transition.
components.portfolio_card: Image container with overflow-hidden. On hover, slight scale-up of image (transform hover:scale-105 duration-500) and cursor change.
components.project_modal: Split-screen layout. A massive Shadcn Dialog taking up 90vw and 85vh. Left side (60% width): Media container (Iframe/Image/Video) with neutral gray background. Right side (40% width): Description with p-12 padding, massive typography.
components.badge_freelance: Pill-shaped or sharp rectangular badge. Border 1px solid accent (#FF3333), text accent, pulsing dot animation.
components.admin_dashboard: Strict, utilitarian 'Control Room' Grid. Dense, data-heavy look. 1px borders, subtle hover states, entirely built with Shadcn UI.

motion.hero_image: Floating parallax or slow organic pan. Reveal animation on mount (clip-path or translateY).
motion.page_transition: Lenis smooth scroll is MANDATORY. Staggered fade-up for portfolio items (Framer Motion).

icons_and_assets.icons: lucide-react for UI interactions (arrows, close, menu).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for the public-facing marketing/portfolio layout. Break conventions.
Use heavily customized Shadcn components for the Admin dashboard, Contact forms, and the Split-Screen Modal.
Implement the portfolio click-to-modal feature using Shadcn Dialog, styled as a split-screen (flex row). Left side: full height iframe or img. Right side: typography and scrollable text.
Ensure standard HTML/JSX allows embedding Behance iframes cleanly. Use a wrapper for responsive iframe scaling.
Use framer-motion for staggering the portfolio grid entrance.
Incorporate the 'Available for Freelance' badge prominently in the Hero or Header section.
